Red Dragon Scales  
 

Attuneable Quest Item
WT: 2.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Red Dragon Scales
Attuneable Quest Item
WT: 2.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:25 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:25
Lucy Entry By:keltana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 01:45:02
Page Updated:Sun Apr 23rd, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 9,500pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 45
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Nagafen's Lair
NPC Name
Lord Nagafen

Ruins of Old Paineel (The Hole)
NPC Name
Echo of Nortlav

Skyfire Mountains
NPC Name
Talendor
The Fabled Talendor

The Western Wastes
NPC Name
Melalafen

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Dreadlands
Quest Name
Bard Epic: Singing Short Sword

East Freeport
Quest Name
Warrior Epic: Jagged Blade of War

North Ro
Quest Name
Dragon Scale Conversion

The Rathe Mountains
Quest Name
Red Dragonscale Armor

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Nagafen's Lair
Ruins of Old Paineel (The Hole)
Skyfire Mountains
The Western Wastes

Naggy still does not like us higher levels
QuoteReply
# Apr 19 2014 at 3:33 PM Rating: Decent
Stageguy
Sage
159 posts
I can confirm that you will still be ported out of Nagafen's Lair if you are too high level and try to run in, even in 2014. I ran in with my 85 bard and saw her across the room and... LOADING, PLEASE WAIT.

Naggy still does not like us higher levels
QuoteReply
# Aug 15 2016 at 6:28 PM Rating: Excellent
snailish
4,580 posts
Stageguy wrote:
I can confirm that you will still be ported out of Nagafen's Lair if you are too high level and try to run in, even in 2014. I ran in with my 85 bard and saw her across the room and... LOADING, PLEASE WAIT.



As an 85 Bard you will find Echo of Nortlav in The Hole a good alternate (if not permafarmed on your server).

# Nov 08 2003 at 12:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592761143204
10 posts
anyone have information as the the
1. zone?
2. location? of verrell cogswin the new npc who can change red dragon scales to green dragon scales on the new patch nov 5 2003?

verrell cogswin im guessing is a gnome?
searched pok pot bb shadowhaven lavastorm ec efreeport no luck yet......

any info on location and zone would greatly help if anyone finds this guy.
▲ Page top
RE: verrell cogswin
QuoteReply
# Nov 14 2003 at 10:29 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788512110
22 posts
i think this guy is maby level based, or atleast level based. i tried to talk to him with my 47 warrior at the time to see if i could find anything out about the quest and he said something like i would be safer hunting wolves, or something demeaning like that. if anyone knows more about the quest please post it here.
▲ Page top
RE: verrell cogswin
QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2003 at 11:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254458092
7 posts
He is in N. Ro. Follow the water heading out from freeport east. As you get closer to the oasis zone, you will see a post or tower on your right. It is not the one right next to the zone for those of you who are familiar, but close to there.

When you hail him he asks for water. I gave him some and he goes on to talk about changing stuff diff colors. When you give him your red scale like he asks, he gives you back(after a couple more dialog prompts... something like "what good news" and "what bad news") a box and a quest. You have to go all over and collect stuff for some glue as he busted your damn scale.. lol... I assume you get the green scale after quest is done... I have not finished it yet. BTW, if anyone finds Deep Fungus Mold please post it here. Is the only part I have not figured out yet. He says to buy it. Maybe one of his many brothers is a merchant?

Posted in both red and green dragon scale discussions.

Michael aka Tazreen Fantasy of Vazelle
Warrior of the 62nd season

Edited, Sat Nov 8 23:38:41 2003
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Oct 26 2003 at 12:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780353106

31 posts

QuoteReply
# Dec 29 2003 at 8:14 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1602462208304
View User Forum
12 posts
This no longer drops from Rage. His loot table was changed to keep people from farming him.
▲ Page top
My word.....
QuoteReply
# Oct 22 2003 at 7:53 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592759769952
View User Forum
Scholar
61 posts
....quit yer whining! Just because someone is selling something doesn't mean you have to buy it. If their price is too high then go get it for yourself. People kill Sev and Ragefire all the time who don't need the scales, and they have every right to sell those items, and they have every right to sell them at the price they want to. You're no more obligated to buy the item than you are to listen to someone just because they're talking on the radio.

Sev and Ragefire both have 32k hp and are an easy single-groupable event at level 65, and an easy 2 group event for your normal high-50s - low-60s folks. It's not like it's hard.

Sorry for going off, but I get so tired of people not wanting to do anything for themselves in this game and to expect everything handed to them on a silver platter. Some of us get places faster because we work for it and do it on our own, instead of waiting around to be in the right place at the right time.

If you want the epic, work for the epic. Work hard. Put groups together, put raids together, expect to fail some, and in the end you'll eventually win. It might take a while but *gasp!* there was a time before PoP and Luclin when it would actually take 45 WHOLE MINUTES to travel from Freeport to Kunark just in the hopes you might find a group when you got there.

Ok ok I'll quit ranting now. But seriously, some of you need to read your own posts and listen to how childish they sound, then do us all a favor and edit them to uber blankness.

Peace out.
▲ Page top
RE: My word.....
QuoteReply
# Oct 22 2003 at 8:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760607996
Scholar
28 posts
Very nice words. If you want something... Work for it or keep your mouth shut.

Nothing is free.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 19 2003 at 9:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Only reason its even this price is b/c of epics other than that the armor it can make isnt impressive anymore sure 2 years ago it was cool but not anymore.
#REDACTED, Posted: May 19 2003 at 9:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Only reason its even this price is b/c of epics other than that the armor it can make isnt impressive anymore sure 2 years ago it was cool but not anymore.
EQ'ers can rot in Hell
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2003 at 10:27 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592253277650
18 posts
Lanys is Hellhole...I like the idea of dragon scales being No Drop...but to save time and defeat...I'd rather buy it. But I saw RDS's for 100k, 50k, and the lowest I seen was 15k. All I have to say is it's complete BS. The green scale was 60k lowest...soooo you telling me to get my warrior epic I need to invest AT LEAST 75k )Not including Permafrost, jewels, and other Non No-drop items needed) for my warrior Epic? Many can agree the epics aint the best items in game...which they outta be...so I would rather invest the 75k in something better...that short blade of lightning for example was 40k in the bazaar. Its just ridiculous I cant even have fun or have to cough up so much cash for a scale that only bards and warriors really need. And dont gimme the whole "Red dragonscale armor" BS cuz that chest item bites for the 3k it costs in the bazaar (and who would pay 15k to make an item that sells for 3k?) Lower your goddamn prices or I'll start rolling on caster items...yea even the No Drops you *********
GRRRAWWWRRRRRR
-Catraris of Lanys stupid-*** lousy greedy server
▲ Page top
RE: EQ'ers can rot in Hell
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2003 at 10:30 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592253277650
18 posts
When I said the dragonscale armor sucks...I was indirectly referring to the Ac21...at my level i want the higher Ac and I invested the 3k into a barbed ringmail...maybe I shouldnt have? But the 20str is nice but i made up for it with SCWB (str15)...maybe ill reconsider when i reach ac cap....point of post was about the price of dragon scales thou. sorry if i insulted any Red DS armor wearers :-)

▲ Page top
Should be no drop
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2003 at 4:34 PM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
Things like this should be no drop that way greedy ubers can't price gouge the needy for them and people who need them have to work for them like was originally intended.


I also find it interesting that finishing the Red Dragonscale armor quest results in an item that sells for 3000PP yet the average price for the red dragon scale listed as I type this is nearly 22,000PP. What moron is going to spend 22K for this when they can just buy the armor for 3K??

If you are not doing the bard/warrior epic it isn't worth the price and I even doubt it for the epic since better weapons have been added to the game since the epics were introduced that don't take months or years to get.

Edited, Sat Mar 1 05:45:14 2003
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
RE: Should be no drop
QuoteReply
# Apr 22 2004 at 1:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1691972204718
Scholar
51 posts
Just a reminder to all the people who keep commenting about RDS armor sucking, and how nobody would ever do that quest... remember that it's a hold over from the very beginning of the game. Red Dragonscale Armor is the original uber armor of EQ, before Kunark came out, long before epics were even thought of. The power-creep of the game may have far surpassed the old classics, but the quests still exist. I'm not suggesting people will presently buy the scale for that purpose, but it's worth thinking about the fact that not everything has always existed in its present form.
▲ Page top

#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 04 2002 at 11:47 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) No it don't. Sorry. Thats YOUR opinion. Lemme tell ya, someone EVER tried to stop me from getting a dragon scale for one of the best stat giveing items in the game for a wizard (White Dragon Scale Armor - 9int, 25 sv cold, back slot- ddebatably the best back slot item in the game for an int caster) when they pay the same ten dollars a month as me I would petition immediately, and, considereing the Play Nice Policy, they have to let me roll.
